children.label: A
children.text: a facility, including a facility that is under the administrative control of the Commandant; and

children.label: i
children.text: that is operated by the Coast Guard, or that the Coast Guard is assisting or escorting; and

children.label: I
children.text: assisting or escorting a vessel of the Department of Defense;

children.label: II
children.text: assisting or escorting a vessel of national security significance, a high interest vessel, a high capacity passenger vessel, or a high value unit, as those terms are defined by the Secretary;

children.label: IV
children.text: assistance in protecting the President or the Vice President (or other officer next in order of succession to the Office of the President) pursuant to the Presidential Protection Assistance Act of 1976 ( note);18 U.S.C. 3056

children.label: V
children.text: protection of a National Special Security Event and Special Event Assessment Rating events;

children.label: VI
children.text: air defense of the United States, including air sovereignty, ground-based air defense, and the National Capital Region integrated air defense system; or

children.label: VII
children.text: a search and rescue operation; and
missions directed by the Secretary pursuant to 210G(k)(3)(C)(iii) of the Homeland Security Act of 2002.2So in original. Probably should be followed by “section”.21
